title: Restrict hosted GPT roles to curator-issued route comments
commit_message: C-05: gate hosted GPT roles by curator trace

files.old:
github.event.issue.number == 31 &&
      github.actor != 'github-actions[bot]' &&
      github.event.comment.user.type != 'Bot' &&
      (contains(github.event.comment.body, '@gpt_executor') ||
       contains(github.event.comment.body, '@gpt_analyst') ||
       contains(github.event.comment.body, '@gpt_auditor') ||
       contains(github.event.comment.body, '@gpt_curator'))
files.new:
github.event.issue.number == 31 &&
      github.actor != 'github-actions[bot]' &&
      github.event.comment.user.type != 'Bot' &&
      contains(github.event.comment.body, 'TYPE: CURATOR_TO_ROLE_EXECUTION') &&
      contains(github.event.comment.body, 'TRACE_ID:') &&
      (contains(github.event.comment.body, '@gpt_executor') ||
       contains(github.event.comment.body, '@gpt_analyst') ||
       contains(github.event.comment.body, '@gpt_auditor') ||
       contains(github.event.comment.body, '@gpt_curator'))

files.old:
parts.append(f'You are {role} for ai-devops-system.')
          parts.append('')
          parts.append('Architecture:')
files.new:
parts.append(f'You are {role} for ai-devops-system.')
          parts.append(f'TRACE_ID={trace_id}')
          parts.append('')
          parts.append('Architecture:')
